## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Join Erin and Sophie&#39;s adorable 6 month anniversary celebration filled with Sanrio-inspired kawaii vibes, pastel dreams, and heartwarming moments!

### Our Story
https://example.com/our-story
Discover how Erin and Sophie&#39;s romance blossomed into six magical months of adventures, laughter, and endless cuteness. Read our heartwarming story now!

### Gallery
https://example.com/gallery
Browse through Erin and Sophie&#39;s sweetest moments captured in an adorable Sanrio-themed photo gallery celebrating their 6 month anniversary together!

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Want to celebrate with Erin and Sophie? Drop a sweet message, share your congratulations, or connect with us to join our kawaii anniversary party!
